meta.title: Aile Diş CRM | Clinic operations with WhatsApp and Instagram

brand.name: Aile Diş CRM
brand.description: Operations, branch and communications dashboard for dental clinics.

hero.title: Manage your clinic from one dashboard
hero.description: Bring your appointments, patient records, treatment workflows, payments, team tasks, branch performance and WhatsApp / Instagram communications together in a modern CRM.

problem.label: Operational workload
problem.title: Growth gets harder when clinic operations are fragmented
problem.description: Visibility decreases when appointments, communications, treatment follow-up, payments and team work remain in separate places.

appointments.title: Fragmented appointment flow
appointments.description: Tracking daily plans and changes can consume valuable time.

history.title: Hard-to-find history
history.description: Patient and treatment workflow information can become disconnected in operations.

payments.title: Disconnected collection tracking
payments.description: Limited visibility of balances and payments can complicate clinic management.

noShow.title: Unmeasured no-shows
noShow.description: Cancellation and absence reasons can disappear without driving action.

features.label: Solution
features.title: An operations centre for dental clinics
features.description: Aile Diş CRM brings together the essential tools for daily operations, communications and performance visibility.

appointments.title: Smart appointment management
appointments.description: Track daily, weekly and branch-based appointment flows in one organised view.

patientHistory.title: Patient and treatment history
patientHistory.description: Review treatment workflows and related operational notes from one record.

collections.title: Payments and collections tracking
collections.description: Monitor payments, outstanding balances and collection status consistently.

noShow.title: No-show and cancellation analysis
noShow.description: Turn cancellation and absence trends into measurable operational data.

branches.title: Multi-clinic management
branches.description: Gain central visibility by comparing your branches through shared metrics.

tasks.title: Team tasks
tasks.description: Manage reception, practitioner and management tasks with greater clarity.

multiClinic.label: Key difference
multiClinic.title: Manage multiple clinics from one screen
multiClinic.description: As a clinic owner or manager, compare your branches' workload, patient growth, collections status and no-show rates.
multiClinic.sampleNote: Values shown are sample product interface data.

integrations.label: Ready integrations
integrations.title: Connect WhatsApp and Instagram conversations to your workflow
integrations.description: Aile Diş CRM provides ready connection and inbox surfaces to bring two key communication channels into your existing clinic workflow.

points.inbox: Monitor incoming conversations from a central inbox
points.workflow: Route messages into appointment and patient operations

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Integration
whatsapp.description: Track WhatsApp connections and incoming conversations within clinic operations.

instagram.title: Instagram DM Integration
instagram.description: Receive Instagram messages and direct relevant requests into appointment flow.

workflow.label: How it works
workflow.title: More visible clinic operations in three steps

setup.title: Define your clinic and team
setup.description: Set up your clinic details, user roles and team members.

operations.title: Manage daily operations
operations.description: Track appointments, patients, treatments, payments and tasks in a shared view.

performance.title: Measure performance
performance.description: Regularly assess clinic and branch visibility through the dashboard.

trust.label: Controlled structure
trust.title: An organised and responsible approach to clinic data
trust.description: Operational data management is addressed through access control and an extensible structure.

roles.title: Role-based access
roles.description: Supports users accessing operational areas appropriate to their duties.

separation.title: Clinic-based data separation
separation.description: Designed to establish controlled clinic visibility in multi-branch organisations.

architecture.title: Modular integration infrastructure
architecture.description: Supports controlled management of ready WhatsApp and Instagram workflows.

compliance.title: Structure for compliance processes
compliance.description: Configurable according to KVKK/GDPR compliance processes.

demo.label: Demo
demo.title: Let us evaluate a suitable structure for your clinic
demo.description: Create a demo request to see how the product could be adapted to your daily operations, multi-clinic needs and communications channels.
demo.formNote: This preview form does not send or store any information.

placeholders.name: Your full name
placeholders.contact: Contact details where we can reach you

demo.successTitle: Your request was prepared as a preview.
demo.successDescription: No information was sent or stored anywhere in this version.

smallClinics.question: Is this system suitable for small clinics?
smallClinics.answer: Yes. It can provide a straightforward operations structure for a single clinic and expand to multiple users or multiple clinics as needs grow.

branches.question: Can I manage more than one branch?
branches.answer: Yes. The multi-clinic view is designed to compare essential operational metrics across branches on one screen.

roles.question: Will there be user roles?
roles.answer: Yes. Access levels can be separated for managers, practitioners, reception and relevant operations roles.

migration.question: Can existing patient data be transferred?
migration.answer: The transfer process is assessed according to the data format. A controlled migration plan can be prepared for structured data.

integrations.question: Are WhatsApp and Instagram integrations ready?
integrations.answer: Yes. WhatsApp connection and inbox flows, and Instagram connection and DM inbox flows, are available in the application. Available capabilities depend on channel setup and user permissions.

demo.question: Can I get a demo or early access?
demo.answer: Demo requests may be assessed as part of the product introduction process. The form on this preview page does not send data yet.

footer.privacyNote: Designed on the principle that sensitive health data must not be shared in reminder communications.
footer.copyright: Aile Diş CRM. MVP product experience for clinic operations management.
